title: The Bigfoot Teacher
summary: A dying blue Bigfoot elder explains perception blocks, the tribes, and his people's homes on the Moon, Mars, and Vega.
markdown:
The **Bigfoot Teacher** of the May 16, 2020 session is one of the archive's most affecting
voices: a **"blue Bigfoot"** elder, some three thousand years old and dying, giving what he
calls his final teaching before releasing his body.

His account overturns the cryptid framing entirely. Bigfoot do not hide with technology but
with **perception blocks** — they *ask* the forest to conceal them: the trees, the rocks, the
air, the water agree to bend attention away. It is consciousness-based invisibility, of a
piece with the archive's larger claim that [perception is negotiable](/lore/parallel-timelines/).

Nor are Bigfoot one people. There are **territorial, military-like tribes** in the national
parks — dangerous to approach — and there is the **space-faring blue tribe**, living on the
[Moon](/lore/the-moon/), on Mars, and among humanity's ancestors in the
[Vega](/lore/vega/) star system. Some Bigfoot civilizations, he says plainly, are **at war
with one another** — a whole hidden geopolitics running parallel to ours.

The session ends with the teacher giving *"his final breath"* and transcending the body — a
quiet enactment, mid-archive, of the deathless transition the sessions promise. He belongs
with the [Insectoids](/lore/insectoids/) and the [Dolphin Race](/lore/dolphin-race/) among the
elder voices: beings older than our history, speaking once through the interface before
moving on.
